PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-28-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections and the matter being properly noticed, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 13, 2010 is admitted to probate. Mark Benson is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed. Status on close of estate is set for August 8, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is to be filed two weeks before the hearing date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Xiao. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-14-2022 Continued To Jun-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
